# SUGARMAGIC FRONTEND TEMPLATE VERSION: 1

# Netlify deployment for wordlark (v1)

Target site: `wordlark-prod`

## What's generated

- `netlify.toml` — Netlify build config (publish dir + SPA redirects).
- `build-config.json` — non-secret build inputs the GHA deploy workflow reads at deploy time.
- `README.md` — this file.

## What's NOT generated here

- Gateway bearer token. Supplied at build time from GitHub Secrets by the deploy workflow (story 46.7+).
- `.netlify/` link directory. `netlify link --id <siteId>` runs from CI.

## Manual fix-up

If you're deploying by hand without the GHA workflow:

```sh
pnpm --filter @sugarmagic/target-web build
netlify deploy --prod --dir=targets/web/dist
```

Set `SUGARMAGIC_GATEWAY_URL` (and `SUGARMAGIC_GATEWAY_BEARER_TOKEN` when
gatewayAuthMode is `bearer`) as build-time env in the Netlify site
dashboard. The GHA workflow injects them automatically when wired up.
